thag5.10:1.2: the dullard hears the Conqueror’s teaching.
thag5.10:1.3: He’s as far from the True Dhamma
thag5.10:1.4: as the ground is from the sky.
thag5.10:2.2: the dullard hears the Conqueror’s teaching.
thag5.10:2.3: He wanes from the True Dhamma
thag5.10:2.4: like the moon in the dark half of the month.
thag5.10:3.2: the dullard hears the Conqueror’s teaching.
thag5.10:3.3: He dries up in the True Dhamma
thag5.10:3.4: like a fish in next to no water.
thag5.10:4.2: the dullard hears the Conqueror’s teaching.
thag5.10:4.3: He doesn’t grow in the True Dhamma,
thag5.10:4.4: like a rotten seed in a field.
thag5.10:5.1: But whoever hears the Conqueror’s teaching
